title: oberonia oblonga
intro: Oberonia oblonga, also known as the orchid plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oberonia oblonga include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
